members.member:
Authenticates a user and generates a JWT token.
The user's login information. An object containing the JWT token and the user's information. The user has been authenticated successfully. The login data is invalid. Incorrect email or password. An internal error occurred. [HttpPost]

member.name: M:AuthController.Register(TaskManagerApi.DTOs.Auth.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Registers a new user.
member.returns: An object containing the JWT token and the user's information.
member.response: The user has been registered successfully.
A user with this email already exists or the data is invalid.
An internal error occurred.

member.name: M:TaskManagerApi.Controllers.TaskController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a specific task by its ID for the authenticated user.
member.response: Task deleted successfully.
Unauthorized - the user is not authenticated.
Not Found - no task with the specified ID exists or it does not belong to the authenticated user.
Bad Request - invalid request parameters.
Internal Server Error - an error occurred while processing the request

member.name: M:TaskManagerApi.Controllers.TaskController.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all tasks for the authenticated user.
member.returns: A list of tasks for the authenticated user.
member.response: Tasks retrieved successfully.
Unauthorized - the user is not authenticated.
Bad Request - invalid request parameters.
Internal Server Error - an error occurred while processing the request

member.name: M:TaskManagerApi.Controllers.TaskController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific task by its ID for the authenticated user.
member.param: The ID of the task to retrieve.
member.returns: The task with the specified ID if it exists and belongs to the authenticated user; otherwise, an appropriate error response.
member.response: Task retrieved successfully.
Unauthorized - the user is not authenticated.
Not Found - no task with the specified ID exists or it does not belong to the authenticated user.
Bad Request - invalid request parameters.
Internal Server Error - an error occurred while processing the request

member.name: M:TaskManagerApi.Controllers.TaskController.Create(CreateTaskDto)
member.summary: Creates a new task for the authenticated user.
member.response: Task created successfully.
Unauthorized - the user is not authenticated.
Bad Request - invalid request parameters.
Internal Server Error - an error occurred while processing the request

member.name: M:TaskManagerApi.Controllers.TaskController.Update(System.Guid,UpdateTaskDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing task for the authenticated user.
member.response: Task updated successfully.
Unauthorized - the user is not authenticated.
Not Found - no task with the specified ID exists or it does not belong to the authenticated user.
Bad Request - invalid request parameters.
Internal Server Error - an error occurred while processing the request

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.DTOs.Auth.LoginDto.Email
member.summary: User's email address.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.DTOs.Auth.LoginDto.Password
member.summary: User's password.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.TaskItem.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the task.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.TaskItem.Title
member.summary: The title of the task.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.TaskItem.Description
member.summary: The description of the task.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.TaskItem.IsCompleted
member.summary: Indicates whether the task is completed.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.TaskItem.CreatedDate
member.summary: Date and time when the task was created.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.TaskItem.DueDate
member.summary: The date and time when the task is due.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.TaskItem.UserId
member.summary: The unique identifier for the user who owns the task.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.User.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the user.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.User.Email
member.summary: User's email address.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.User.PasswordHash
member.summary: Hashed password.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.User.FirstName
member.summary: User's first name.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.User.LastName
member.summary: User's last name.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.User.CreatedDate
member.summary: Date and time when the user was created.

member.name: P:TaskManagerApi.Entities.User.Tasks
member.summary: Collection of tasks associated with the user.

member.name: P:ErrorLog.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the error log entry

member.name: P:ErrorLog.Message
member.summary: The error message that was logged.

member.name: P:ErrorLog.InnerMessage
member.summary: The inner exception message.

member.name: P:ErrorLog.StackTrace
member.summary: The stack trace of the error.

member.name: P:ErrorLog.CreatedDate
member.summary: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

member.name: P:ErrorLog.UserId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the user associated with the error.
